CustomField.label: Runtime Trigger Layer ID
CustomField.description: Runtime-only carrier field. Never set in CMT records. NEPA_Team_Assembly_Orchestrator populates this field on the in-memory SObject variable (var_CurrentPair) to pass the nepa_detected_protection_layer__c record ID alongside CMT template fields to NEPA_Work_Order_Generator. Allows a single typed NEPA_Layer_Discipline__mdt collection to carry both CMT data and runtime context without a custom intermediate object.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Set at runtime by NEPA_Team_Assembly_Orchestrator. Do not populate in CMT records.
